summary: Completed comprehensive frontend UI redesign testing for MapTDP application. Verified dark glassmorphism theme implementation, responsiveness, and all interactive elements across desktop and mobile viewports.
passed_tests: Dark theme background (#050505) correctly applied on all pages
Header 'MapTDP' with gradient cyan text color visible and properly styled
Three main cards present: TDP Search, Dernières recherches, Création de répartiteur
Glassmorphism effects working with backdrop-filter: blur(12px) and semi-transparent backgrounds
Search textarea functional with dark background and light text
All buttons clickable with cyan accent borders and hover effects
'Lancer la recherche' button functional and styled correctly
'Effacer l'historique' button functional and styled correctly
Cards responsive - properly stacked on mobile (390px width), side-by-side on desktop
Displayer page loads with correct dark theme and styled form controls
All required data-testid attributes present: search-card, search-textarea, search-submit-button, last-search-card, clear-history-button, info-card, card-action-button, app-title
FontAwesome icons visible and properly integrated across all pages
React Switch component functional with proper styling
Mobile responsive design working correctly at 390px viewport
Form controls have dark backgrounds with light text on all pages
Hover effects and micro-interactions working on buttons and cards
